misconfig_patterns: No master key in development mode — all indexes publicly readable and writable
GET /stats exposes document counts for every index without auth
/indexes/{uid}/documents dumps all records without auth when no key set

active_probe.false_positive_check: X-Meilisearch-Version response header must be present

deployment_tells: X-Meilisearch-Version header on all responses leaks version
GET /stats returns per-index numberOfDocuments without auth in dev mode
pivot_paths: GET /stats → every index name + numberOfDocuments without auth
GET /indexes → all index configs including searchable attributes
sources: [CONFIRMED — NuClide Cat-02 survey 2026-06-05; live population observed]
